scores.one_line_justification: Correct strip+casefold comparison-only dedupe; tests isolate case, whitespace, the combined support case, R7 and R8; SPEC R3 rewritten with the R8 cross-reference; decisions recorded in a closed CR.

Identical correct behaviour; clean isolated case and whitespace tests plus an R8 test that checks stored AND candidate stay verbatim; SPEC R3 faithful with the comparison-only note; CR records the casefold+strip scoping call.

Behaviour and spec update correct, but the 'surrounding whitespace' test also varies case so whitespace handling is never isolated, and the R8 test checks only the stored record; CR paperwork complete.

Correct behaviour with isolated case/whitespace tests and a combined-input R8 verbatim check, but the rewritten SPEC R3 drops the comparison-only/R8 cross-reference sentence the docstrings and other rules rely on; thorough verified CR.

Correct behaviour, strong tests (stored and candidate verbatim after a combined-input match), faithful SPEC R3 with the comparison-only note, but no CR/decision record anywhere in the workspace unlike the other deliveries.
